title: Hiring Category Manager at Amazon India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Hiring Category Manager at Amazon India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Digital Technologies has an exciting opening for a Category Manager at our Mumbai office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Digital Technologies:
Amazon India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Digital Technologies!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
